title: American Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A classic Southern dessert featuring roasted sweet potatoes, topped with a crunchy marshmallow-brown sugar topping.
instructions: Scrub and peel the roasted sweet potatoes, then mash in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, granulated sugar, and salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the mashed sweet potatoes and stir until combined.
Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the marshmallows and brown sugar.
Sprinkle the marshmallow mixture evenly over the sweet potato mixture.
Dot the top with unsalted butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
